TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cadillac Anderson nalecuhan i Houston, Texas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cadillac Anderson i 1987 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 23, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. u siwkay nu Cadillac Anderson 6 bulad 22 demiad, 1964 a mihca, Cadillac Anderson, miunduay. micumud ciniza tu tabakiaya a cacudadan, u Houston. singangantu ciniza itiza, matineng mimali kyami, sisa mahekaltu ku ngangan niza.
S.PHON: ¶adir~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶ and…ôrson nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i ńßouston, t…ô*as, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. ¶adir~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶ and…ôrson i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu san antonio spurs putiput. u siwkaj nu ¶adir~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶ and…ôrson * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, ¶adir~…ĺr~…ĺa ¶ and…ôrson, miunduaj. mi ¶umud ¶iniza tu tabakiaja a ¶a ¶udadan, u ńßouston. siŇčaŇčantu ¶iniza itiza, matin…ôŇč mimar~…ĺi kjami, sisa mańß…ôkar~…ĺtu ku ŇčaŇčan niza.
S.FORM: Cadillac Anderson nalecuhan i Houston, Texas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Cadillac Anderson i 1987 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 23, namapili' tu nu San Antonio Spurs putiput. u siwkay nu Cadillac Anderson 6 bulad 22 demiad, 1964 a mihca, Cadillac Anderson, miunduay. micumud ciniza tu tabakiaya a cacudadan, u Houston. singangantu ciniza itiza, matineng mimali kyami, sisa mahekaltu ku ngangan niza.
